title: justicia bartlettii
intro: Justicia bartlettii, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or Bartlett's justicia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family, and its flowers are known for their sweet fragrance and white color with yellow markings. The medicinal properties of Justicia bartlettii include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Justicia bartlettii can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and promoting skin healing.
